1753340.name: Memory Dimension
1753340.description:
Memory Dimension is a fast-paced Vampire-Like Bullet Hell set in enclosed arenas.
You will play as Dave, a programmer trapped in a simulation controlled by a powerful AI. Dave remembers nothing and must dive into his own memory dimensions to understand why he ended up in the simulation.

KEY FEATURES

Dynamic Gameplay

Intense Bullet Hell action, hundreds of enemies, endless excitement. You won't be able to put it down! We've already played it for over 100 hours, and it's definitely not because we're the developers!

Every Run is Unique

Randomized maps, weapons, items, enemies, and events. Honestly, even we sometimes get confused about what is generated where and how. But unique gameplay situations are guaranteed.

Flexible Build System

56 types of weapons, over 100 passive items, evolutions, synergies, and much more allow you to create your own unique machine for shredding enemies into polygons.

Crazy World Design

Hey, we're in a simulation! Anything can happen here! A battle against three-eyed superhero frogs on a doughnut floating in space? Easy! Insane weapon combinations? No problem at all! Unique events and dialogues? Make it two! You've probably never seen a more unique and vibrant world than ours.

Captivating Storyline

Who are you? Why are you in the simulation? Why don't you remember anything? Who created the AI? Who killed Kenny? Why is the AI opposing you? You'll have to find answers to these and many other questions as Dave. And all of this is accompanied by quirky humor, interesting characters, and awesome dialogues. Get your tissues ready!

Challenge

Oh, are you a little hardcore fan? Let's see how your chair handles the flames on the 4th hacking level! Our game designer lost sleep creating a unique, nerve-wracking gameplay experience. This game will challenge you, no doubt!

"I can create an infinite number of worlds, but can you win infinitely?" - a quote from the AI.
